title: Astronomers just watched a star 1,540 times the size of our sun transform into a hypergiant. Will it go supernova?
description: One of our universe's biggest stars has dramatically turned into a rare, yellow 'hypergiant' star, and astronomers aren't sure when it will go supernova.
content: One of our universe's biggest stars has dramatically turned into a rare, yellow 'hypergiant' star, and astronomers aren't sure when it will go supernova.
